full_name: Standard Specification for Chromium and Chromium-Nickel Stainless Steel Plate, Sheet, and Strip for Pressure Vessels and for General Applications
scope: Covers chromium and chromium-nickel stainless steel plate, sheet, and strip for pressure vessels and general applications. Type 304 (UNS S30400) is the common austenitic 18/8 grade.
license_note: Composition/property data for Type 304 widely republished by independent free sources (stainless distributors, educational sites), not the copyrighted ASTM document text itself.
